scenario.name: VQ PUBLISH Flood
scenario.send:
PUBLISH sip:collector@[remote_ip]:[remote_port] SIP/2.0 Via: SIP/2.0/UDP [local_ip]:[local_port];branch=[branch] From: sipp <sip:sipp@[local_ip]>;tag=[call_number] To: collector <sip:collector@[remote_ip]:[remote_port]> Call-ID: [call_id] CSeq: 1 PUBLISH Max-Forwards: 70 Event: vq-rtcpxr Content-Type: application/vq-rtcpxr Content-Length: [len]
VQSessionReport: CallTerm CallID: [call_id]@[local_ip] LocalID: sip:user1@[local_ip] RemoteID: sip:user2@[remote_ip] NLR=1.20 JDR=2.50 BLD=0.80 GLD=0.15 RTD=85.3 ESD=42.7 IAJ=8.1 MAJ=4.2 MOSLQ=3.8 MOSCQ=3.5 RLQ=78.0 RCQ=72.0 RERL=45.0
